per_cluster.representative_question: Bagaimana definisi, fungsi, serta langkah-langkah dasar dalam mengoperasikan teknologi ini beserta kelebihan dan kekurangannya?

rationales.gemini: The questions are consistently focused on the basic definitions, functions, and operational workflows of the technology.
rationales.claude: The questions are very generic and vague (e.g., 'semua yang diperlukan', 'cara untuk mengoperasikannya') without any specific technology mentioned, making coherence weak. The label 'Pengenalan dan Operasional Dasar Teknologi' is too broad and doesn't capture a specific topic, and these questions seem like they belong to a different or more general context than the Hadoop-focused clusters.
rationales.gpt: Pertanyaan-pertanyaannya konsisten meminta pengertian, fungsi, komponen/tools, cara kerja, dan cara mengoperasikan/instalasi secara umum. Label sesuai namun masih sangat generik (tidak menyebut teknologi spesifik).

per_cluster.topic_label: Korelasi Ekosistem Hadoop dengan Big Data
per_cluster.representative_question: Apa peran ekosistem Hadoop dalam teknologi big data dan bagaimana relevansinya terhadap kurikulum program studi teknologi rekayasa perangkat lunak?

rationales.gemini: Every question specifically addresses the relationship between the Hadoop ecosystem and the Big Data course or curriculum.
rationales.claude: All questions consistently ask about Hadoop ecosystem in relation to big data and the study program context, showing good coherence. The label accurately reflects the correlation theme, though it could be slightly more precise about the 'study program' aspect.
rationales.gpt: Semua pertanyaan membahas ekosistem Hadoop, hubungannya dengan big data, serta relevansi dengan mata kuliah/prodi dan cara menguasainya. Label menangkap korelasi Hadoop–Big Data dengan tepat.

per_cluster.representative_question: Apa yang dimaksud dengan ekosistem Hadoop secara mendalam dan apa saja kegunaan utamanya dalam konteks umum?

per_cluster.representative_question: Mengapa kita membutuhkan ekosistem Hadoop dan bagaimana cara kerja integrasi berbagai teknologinya dalam memproses data?

rationales.gemini: Questions are centered specifically on the mechanics and internal processes of how the ecosystem functions.
rationales.claude: All five questions consistently ask about how the Hadoop ecosystem works and why it is needed, demonstrating excellent coherence. The label is accurate but slightly overlaps with cluster 4; 'Mekanisme Kerja' is a reasonable distinction.
rationales.gpt: Semua pertanyaan menanyakan apa itu ekosistem Hadoop, mengapa dibutuhkan, dan bagaimana cara kerjanya secara terintegrasi. Label tepat menggambarkan mekanisme kerja ekosistem.

per_cluster.topic_label: Pemrosesan Data Terdistribusi dan Integrasi Tools
per_cluster.representative_question: Bagaimana alur kerja pemrosesan data terdistribusi dari HDFS hingga MapReduce, serta bagaimana perbandingan performanya dengan Apache Spark?

rationales.gemini: Strongly coherent group of more advanced questions involving specific components (HDFS, YARN, Spark) and end-to-end data pipelines.
rationales.claude: Most questions are about Hadoop components like HDFS, MapReduce, and Spark integration, but the cluster mixes high-level conceptual questions with very detailed technical ones, reducing coherence. The label is partially accurate but too narrow given the breadth of questions included.
rationales.gpt: Isinya kuat pada alur end-to-end pemrosesan big data terdistribusi (HDFS/YARN/MapReduce) dan integrasi dengan Hive/Spark, meski ada beberapa pertanyaan yang lebih umum tentang big data. Label sangat sesuai dengan fokus integrasi dan pemrosesan terdistribusi.

per_cluster.representative_question: Bagaimana penerapan ekosistem Hadoop dalam skala industri nyata dan apa saja praktik terbaik untuk mencapai efisiensi maksimal?

rationales.gemini: Questions focus clearly on the practical application, industrial use cases, and efficiency of Hadoop in the real world.
rationales.claude: Questions vary from general Hadoop usage to industry best practices, with only a few truly focused on industry implementation. The label overstates the industry focus since most questions are still fairly general about usage and benefits.
rationales.gpt: Sebagian besar menyinggung penggunaan nyata/best practice, peran di industri, efisiensi, dan perbandingan dengan tools lain, namun ada beberapa pertanyaan yang masih umum tentang 'alur/penggunaan'. Label cukup tepat tetapi sedikit terlalu spesifik ke industri untuk semua item.

per_cluster.representative_question: Bagaimana cara mengoperasikan Hadoop untuk melakukan penyimpanan serta pengolahan big data menggunakan alat-alat yang tersedia?

rationales.gemini: Focuses on the functional utility of the tools for the specific tasks of storing and processing data.
rationales.claude: Most questions relate to storing and processing data with Hadoop tools, but some are very vague (e.g., 'bagaimana data diproses dalam waktu persamaan'). The label is reasonably accurate for the majority of the questions.
rationales.gpt: Pertanyaan berkisar pada cara menggunakan Hadoop untuk menyimpan dan mengolah data, termasuk menyebut tools/ekosistem Apache, walau ada satu item yang kurang jelas. Label tepat mencakup penyimpanan dan pengolahan data di Hadoop.

per_cluster.representative_question: Bagaimana struktur bagian dalam ekosistem Hadoop berkembang dan bagaimana implementasi praktisnya dalam lingkungan kerja profesional?

rationales.gemini: The theme is mostly consistent around implementation, though the 'development/evolution' aspect in the label is only supported by one question.
rationales.claude: The questions are loosely related to Hadoop but span very different sub-topics: HDFS functions, professional implementation, ecosystem development, and general curiosity, making coherence low. The label 'Perkembangan dan Praktik' poorly captures this heterogeneous mix.
rationales.gpt: Pertanyaan membahas bagian/fungsi komponen (mis. HDFS), perkembangan ekosistem, dan implementasi/praktik di dunia nyata/profesional. Label cukup cocok, namun klaster lebih dominan ke 'komponen & implementasi' daripada benar-benar 'perkembangan' secara mendalam.

rationales.gemini: Many questions in the noise cluster (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q4) are standard queries about definition and cara kerja that clearly belong in Clusters 3, 5, or 6.

These are not genuine outliers and should have been assigned to existing clusters.

fleiss_kappa.note: Fleiss' κ measures inter-judge agreement beyond chance. κ > 0.61 = Substantial, κ > 0.41 = Moderate (Landis & Koch, 1977).
